novel_features.name: Settlement reconciliation
novel_features.description: Match synced charges and payouts to their funding events locally, showing what has settled to your account and what is still outstanding.

novel_features.name: Payment pipeline & cancel window
novel_features.description: Group synced charges and payouts by lifecycle status and flag which are still cancelable (created/scheduled/on_hold) versus locked once they reach pending.

novel_features.name: Return & NSF analysis
novel_features.description: Surface failed and reversed payments with their ACH reason codes and rank repeat-offender paykeys and customers from the local store.

novel_features.name: Identity review queue
novel_features.description: List customers and paykeys sitting in review status, oldest first, with age-in-queue so the KYC backlog is triageable.

novel_features.name: Cashflow analytics
novel_features.description: Aggregate synced charge volume in versus payout volume out over a date window, including zero-activity days, with net flow per day or week.

novel_features.name: Paykey expiry & block monitor
novel_features.description: List paykeys approaching their expires_at and blocked paykeys that are unblock-eligible, so payments do not fail on stale tokens.

novel_features.name: Sandbox outcome reference
novel_features.description: Print the deterministic sandbox_outcome values for customers, paykeys, charges, and payouts plus the sandbox test bank values so test scenarios are scriptable.
